allow: Bash(node -e "import\(''zod''\).then\(\({z}\) => { try { z.string\(\).min\(5\).parse\(''x''\) } catch\(e\) { console.log\(JSON.stringify\(e, null, 2\).slice\(0, 500\)\) } }\)")

Bash(node -e "import\(''zod''\).then\(\({z}\) => { try { z.string\(\).min\(5\).parse\(''x''\) } catch\(e\) { console.log\(Object.keys\(e\)\); console.log\(e.issues ? JSON.stringify\(e.issues\) : ''no issues''\); } }\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(''GenSearch - Contatos Enriquecidos.json'', encoding=''utf-8''\)\); print\(''Contatos:'', len\(d[''contatos'']\)\); c=d[''contatos''][0]; print\(''Primeiro:'', c[''empresa'']\); a=c.get\(''anvisa'',{}\); print\(''Refs:'', a.get\(''medicamentos_referencia_ativos'',[]\)\); print\(''Sims:'', a.get\(''medicamentos_similares_notaveis'',[]\)[:3]\)")
